cardano/transaction/OutputReference.title: OutputReference
cardano/transaction/OutputReference.description:
An `OutputReference` is a unique reference to an output on-chain. The `output_index`
 corresponds to the position in the output list of the transaction (identified by its id)
 that produced that output

prediction_market/types/MarketParams.title: MarketParams
prediction_market/types/MarketParams.description: Parameter for the market validator (makes each market's policy ID unique)

prediction_market/types/PriceFeed.title: PriceFeed
prediction_market/types/PriceFeed.description:
price: raw integer price
 name: feed identifier (e.g., "BTC/USD")
 timestamp: POSIX ms

prediction_market/types/SignedPriceFeed.title: SignedPriceFeed
prediction_market/types/SignedPriceFeed.description: Signed price feed for Ed25519 oracle verification
